<?php namespace Illuminate\Auth\Passwords; use Illuminate\Auth\Notifications\ResetPassword as ResetPasswordNotification; trait CanResetPassword { /** * Get the e-mail address where password reset links are sent. * * @return string */ public function getEmailForPasswordReset() { return $this->email; } /** * Send the password reset notification. * * @param string $token * @return void */ public function sendPasswordResetNotification(#[\SensitiveParameter] $token) { $this->notify(new ResetPasswordNotification($token)); } }
